description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a wide, swept-back wing design and a robust, armored fuselage. The aircraft features four prominent engine nacelles mounted under the wings, with two on each side, and a large central engine at the rear. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed with a tinted canopy and flanked by angular panels. The tail section is compact, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from the rear. The surface is primarily metallic gray, with visible panel lines and subtle shading that suggest a durable, high-performance construction. The overall design is reminiscent of advanced military or sci-fi aircraft, emphasizing speed, maneuverability, and protection.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with swept-back wings, five visible engines, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. The metallic gray body features robust paneling and a compact tail with a single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, swept-back wings, four underwing engines, and the central rear engine, with the cockpit canopy visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, the placement of the engines under the wings, and the compact tail section with a single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, the angular wing shape, and the symmetrical arrangement of the engines and stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the same features from the other side, including the engine placement and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and no visible winglets; wings are integrated with the main fuselage and feature a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Five jet engines: four underwing-mounted and one central rear-mounted jet engine.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with visible main gear bays under the wings and a nose gear bay under the forward fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single or dual-seat, featuring a prominent front window.
